div.style: color: #cdd6f4; line-height: 19px; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-all;

foreignObject.div:
unityctl — 131 commands · 12 MCP tools
Core (13) ping Verify connectivity to Unity status Editor state (with --wait smart polling) check Verify script compilation (headless) build Build player with --dry-run preflight test Run EditMode / PlayMode tests doctor Diagnose connectivity + suggest recovery project validate Game readiness check (6 checks) exec Execute C# expression in Unity
Scene & GameObject (19) scene hierarchy Scene hierarchy tree scene diff Property-level scene diff with epsilon gameobject create Create / delete / rename / find component add Add / remove / get / set-property
Assets & Materials (21) asset find Search by type/label/path material create Create / get / set / set-shader prefab create Create / unpack / apply / edit
Scripting (10) script create Create C# script from template script patch Line-level insert/delete/replace script get-errors Structured errors (file/line/column)
+ Editor Control (18) · Build (6) · Physics/Lighting (12) UI/Mesh (8) · Automation (15)
→ unityctl tools --json for full list
